note: Every modification the editor image makes to the upstream build, as typed units. Type 'translation-data' is data that belongs in editor/l10n/overrides/ (PO-L10N-006 is being migrated there); all other units are code/asset/config/theme patches, currently inline in editor/Dockerfile. At the target source build (assisted_translate.md) the code patches become a patch series and the data is merged/compiled separately. dockerfile_lines are approximate and may shift as the file changes.

patches.title: Fold glass theme into bundle.css + external po-toggle.js theme gate
patches.rationale: Theme is part of the editor's own stylesheet (correct on first paint), gated by a same-origin external script (CSP-safe), not an override sheet.
patches.rollback: Drop the cat>>bundle.css and the two cool.html sed lines; remove the po-toggle.js COPY.

patches.title: Delete dead inline dark-theme <script> from cool.html
patches.rationale: Inline script violates the binary-baked CSP on every load and never runs (gated on ?darkTheme, which our integration never sets); deletion is behavior-preserving.
patches.rollback: Remove the sed; the dead block returns on rebuild.

patches.title: Rewrite Collabora product/copyright display strings to PrivateOffice
patches.rationale: MPL-2.0 permits modifying this self-hosted build; phrases first, then the bare word on data/markup files only (not the bundle.js global).

patches.title: De-concatenate ribbon group expander 'More options for {1}'
patches.rationale: Upstream builds 'More options for '+id as a raw concat (never translated, leaks the control id); route through the existing catalog key 'More options for {1}'.
patches.rollback: Revert the sed to the original concat.

patches.title: De-concatenate combobox accessible name 'Open {name}'
patches.rationale: Upstream composes _('Open ')+value+_(' list') (un-localizable fragments leak English / freeze word order); route through the existing 'Open {name}' key.

patches.title: Client catalog string injections (12 langs)
patches.render_path: client (UNVERIFIED per string: catalog presence does not prove the string renders from the client catalog - some render from core. Verify each, see the Clipboard caveat in assisted_translate.md).
patches.rationale: Fills missing client _() keys the merged catalog omits. The values are now extracted to editor/l10n/overrides/client/<lang>.json as canonical data.
patches.rollback: Remove the 12 sed lines (and, after migration, the overrides merge step).
patches.status: active (pending migration to overrides/client; needs a verify build)

patches.title: Neutralize upstream URLs to about:blank
patches.rationale: No phone-home and no upstream-identity leak via header-logo / release-notes / docs / proxy links.
patches.rollback: Remove the two grep|sed URL passes.

patches.title: Replace upstream logo images with the PrivateOffice mark
patches.rationale: About wordmark and header logo show PrivateOffice.
patches.rollback: Remove the cp loop; the original images return on rebuild.

patches.title: Materialize missing lc_pastespecial.svg icon (light + dark)
patches.rationale: Engine deterministically requests an icon upstream omits -> 404 + blank icon; copy it from the shipped paste art.

patches.title: getImageURL empty-name guard (no stray images/ request)
patches.rationale: Icon-less submenu entries build getURL('images/') -> 404; return '' for an empty imgName, matching the engine's own empty-path guard.

patches.title: Neutralize serve-time %PLACEHOLDER% branding + inject rebranded branding.js + remove welcome
patches.rationale: coolwsd substitutes %PRODUCT_BRANDING_NAME/URL% at serve time (the bare-word sed never sees them); set them to PrivateOffice / about:blank, empty feedback/welcome/buyproduct, drop welcome assets.
patches.rollback: Remove the placeholder sed + branding.js inject; keep welcome.

patches.title: Per-build ETag via ver_suffix = BUILD_ID (coolwsd.xml)
patches.rationale: ETag derives from the compile-time hash, which our content patches never change; stamp BUILD_ID into ver_suffix so each patched rebuild yields a fresh ETag.
patches.rollback: Remove the sed; the ETag reverts to the upstream hash.

patches.title: Cache-bust cool.html-referenced assets with ?b=BUILD_ID
patches.rationale: Browsers holding a 128-day max-age copy won't revalidate; ?b= forces a refetch of the patched bundle.css/js + l10n catalogs on next open.
